proposed_catalog_row.Paper: An estimated DSGE model of energy, costs and inflation in the United Kingdom
proposed_catalog_row.ModelType: Log-linear estimated DSGE, small open economy
proposed_catalog_row.Category: Energy; New Keynesian; Small Open Economy
proposed_catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Three consumption goods; petrol and utilities; sectoral NKPCs; habit formation; capital adjustment costs; variable utilization; working-capital cost channel; UIP; Taylor rule
proposed_catalog_row.RawPDF: raw/mmb_papers/An estimated DSGE model of energy, costs and inflation in the United Kingdom.pdf

proposed_status_row.paper_title: An estimated DSGE model of energy, costs and inflation in the United Kingdom
proposed_status_row.raw_pdf_path: raw/mmb_papers/An estimated DSGE model of energy, costs and inflation in the United Kingdom.pdf
proposed_status_row.notes: Paper prints log-linear equilibrium conditions and cites technical appendix for primitive derivation; no Dynare run performed.

unresolved_issues: Primitive nonlinear optimization problems require Harrison et al. (2011) technical appendix.
OCR-sensitive formula checks remain for capital accumulation, wage Phillips curve, import-price Phillips curve, and foreign shock notation.
Taylor-rule output-gap notation requires source-level review against PDF/appendix.
